reviews.comment:
La nueva estación!!!, una gran inversión para la atención del visitante, todo 0 km, muy moderna, muy buena atención de los playeros, los baños ..... como si estuvieras en tu casa. El shopping super completo

(Translated by Google)
The new station is fantastic! A great investment in visitor services. Everything is brand new, very modern, the attendants are excellent, and the restrooms... feel like home. The shopping center is super complete.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjc1BqVFJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pesima atención y tiempo perdido, si pudiese darle 0 estrellas lo haria, llegue, espere 5 minutos a que me asignen 1 surtidor, como nadie me atendió, movi mi auto a uno vacío, instantaneamente de mala forma un empleado me dijo que me corra a otro, lo hice. Luego de esperar otros 5 minutos abrieron 1 surtidor que estaba cerrado, y otros autos que llegaron después de mi fueron atendidos  instantaneamente, por lo que decidí irme a la estación YPF que yo recomiendo de calle Pachecho y Lisandro Latorre. YPF ACA no recomiendo, a menos que quieran pasar un mal momento.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service and a huge waste of time. If I could give it zero stars, I would. I arrived and waited five minutes to be assigned a pump. Since no one attended to me, I moved my car to an empty one. Immediately, an employee rudely told me to move to another pump, which I did. After waiting another five minutes, they opened a pump that had been closed, and other cars that arrived after me were served immediately. So I decided to go to the YPF station I recommend on the corner of Pacheco and Lisandro Latorre streets. I don't recommend YPF ACA unless you want to have a bad experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzMmFyN0FREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención y está genial, tiene aire para los neumáticos, cosa que en otras estaciones hay pero casi nunca funcionan, la remodelación la hizo mucho más funcional. Excelente.

(Translated by Google)
The service is great, and they have air pumps for tires, which other stations have but they almost never work. The renovation made it much more functional. Excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzZ29pRHR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La estacion de servicio mas lenta del pais y si te toca el cambio de turno del personal tenes que seguir esperando mas 30 min. Un desastre!!!! Y si preguntas si esta el encargado nunca esta. Muchachos hagan un curso de atencion al público dejan mucho que desear el servicio al cliente.

(Translated by Google)
The slowest gas station in the country, and if you get a shift change, you have to wait another 30 minutes. A disaster! And if you ask if the manager is there, he's never there. Guys, take a customer service course; their customer service leaves a lot to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzak0tTC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy linda YPF se actualizo y quedo bien organizada y muy linda, amplios lugares para maniobras en la playa, pero falta un poco de organizacion en la Salida y entrada

(Translated by Google)
YPF is very nice; it's been updated and is now well-organized and very attractive, with ample space for maneuvering on the beach. However, the entrance and exit could use some improvement.
